title: Expiriments with subject 13
body: Things seem to be going unusually well with subject 13. Perhaphs they are from better stock than the usual cattle. Please keep administering serum 6 on a biweekly basis. As always I will observe the results when I am able. oh please do remember to feed and water the other human they shall be required for our next round of trials.

title: Contrato n22
body: Sector: X11.  Objective: Investigate the sewers and report only to me.  Reward: 22 MCr.

title: wtf are you kidding me?
body: Are you kidding me? Why don't you change your password?  The system is entirely compromised until you correct it.  You're the sysadmin, if you're this dumb the corporation is at risk.
